# t4o Provider

Terraform provider for TrilioVault for OpenStack (T4O). Manages backup targets, workloads, and policies via the WLM API.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `auth_url` (String) OpenStack Keystone endpoint. Falls back to `OS_AUTH_URL` environment variable.
- `domain_name` (String) OpenStack domain name. Falls back to `OS_USER_DOMAIN_NAME` or `OS_DOMAIN_NAME`. Defaults to `Default`.
- `insecure` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification. For dev/lab environments only.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) OpenStack password. Falls back to `OS_PASSWORD`.
- `project_id` (String) OpenStack project (tenant) UUID. Falls back to `OS_PROJECT_ID`.
- `username` (String) OpenStack username. Falls back to `OS_USERNAME`.
- `wlm_endpoint` (String) Override WLM base URL (e.g. `http://10.0.0.10:8781/v1`). Normally auto-discovered from Keystone catalog.
- `wlm_service_type` (String) Keystone catalog service type for WLM endpoint discovery. Defaults to `workloads` (Kolla); use `workloadmgr` for DevStack.
